title: Claude’s official “Get inspired by what you can do with Claude” page is well worth a look. It covers practical examples across research, writing, coding, analysis, and everyday work, and it goes much deeper than I expected. Instead of reading second-hand summaries, it’s better to go straight to the official collection. https://claude.com/resources/use-cases
